title: zanthoxylum backeri
intro: Zanthoxylum backeri, also known as the Backer's prickly ash, is a type of plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family of flowering plants. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum backeri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams.
